must_cover_coverage.the_seat_and_when_term_starts: Multi-member House D19 sends 3 Delegates; primary 6/23/2026, general 11/2026; 4-year term Jan 2027-Jan 2031
must_cover_coverage.every_other_candidate_filed: Slate: Sen Ben Kramer (Senate), Del Vaughn Stewart (House re-election with Crutchfield). Cullison seat open: Christa Tichy of Aspen Hill filed; Sunil Dasgupta of Rockville and Christopher Jennison of Aspen Hill considering
must_cover_coverage.3-5_substantive_policy_disagreements: 5 axes named: (1) Blueprint/fiscal — slate uniformly supportive; (2) criminal justice — Crutchfield is slate's specialist; (3) housing/zoning — Stewart is most progressive; (4) transit/Metro — slate uniformly supportive; (5) Wootton/MCPS — slate has not taken positions
must_cover_coverage.listener_flagged_topics_in_this_race: Sanctuary: slate likely supports existing MD framework. Fiscal restriction: NOT this slate, look at open-seat field. Wootton: state venue is District 15 not D19. Property tax: County Council ballot, not D19 House
must_cover_coverage.what_concretely_changes_if_THIS_candidat: Continuity — Crutchfield continues as Corrections Subcommittee chair + Deputy Majority Whip + slate model. If she loses, slate model breaks and the third Delegate goes to whoever displaced her plus open-seat winner
